custom/power.on-click: pkill swaynag; swaynag -t power -e bottom -f 'Google Sans 20' --background 1E1E2EFF --text CAD3F5FF --button-background 45475AFF --button-text CAD3F5FF --border 1E1E2EFF --border-bottom ED8796FF --border-bottom-size 4 --button-border-size 0 --button-padding 14 --button-gap 20 --button-dismiss-gap 20 --button-margin-right 20 --message-padding 20 -m '  Power off the tablet?' -Z '  Yes, Power Off' 'systemctl poweroff' -s '  Cancel'

custom/reboot.on-click: pkill swaynag; swaynag -t reboot -e bottom -f 'Google Sans 20' --background 1E1E2EFF --text CAD3F5FF --button-background 45475AFF --button-text CAD3F5FF --border 1E1E2EFF --border-bottom EED49FFF --border-bottom-size 4 --button-border-size 0 --button-padding 14 --button-gap 20 --button-dismiss-gap 20 --button-margin-right 20 --message-padding 20 -m '  Reboot the tablet?' -Z '  Yes, Reboot' 'systemctl reboot' -s '  Cancel'
